summary: Tested Feature Actions matrix in Administration > Role Permissions tab and canDo() permission guards across pages. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test admin user with session test_session_admin_1774397267032
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role Permissions tab has two sections: Page Access (10 pages) and Feature Actions (10 actions in 6 groups). data-testid for feature actions: perm-{role}-{action.key.replace('.', '-')} e.g. perm-teacher-students-add_edit. All toggle/save/reset flows working. GET /api/settings returns role_feature_permissions. Admin sees all buttons: add-student-btn, bulk-edit-toggle, new-intervention-btn, export-interventions-btn, get-ai-suggestions-btn, add-intervention-btn (student profile), add-note-btn (case notes tab).
